# Normalized Work Model

Prose status: draft

## Requirements

- FR-001: Normalize authored lifecycle work.
- FR-002: Diagnose conflicting lifecycle data.
- FR-003: Check generated work-model currency.

## Decisions

- DEC-001: Normalize from FileSnapshot values and return generated output.
- DEC-002: Structured graph data remains execution authority.
